universalDisclaimer: This document is a general safety template and educational resource. It is not legal advice, does not replace a site-specific hazard assessment, and does not guarantee compliance with OSHA or any federal, state, or local requirement. Employers are responsible for reviewing, customizing, implementing, training employees on, and maintaining their own safety programs and records. Consult a qualified safety professional, legal counsel, or regulatory authority when needed.
